claim: Perplexity Computer is a fully-hosted alternative to Open Claw with threaded tasks, pre-built connectors (Gmail, GitHub, Notion, etc.), and Anthropic-managed security
actionable: Use Perplexity Computer for rapid agent deployment when you want hosted infrastructure without managing security, credentials, or infrastructure maintenance.
source_title: Perplexity Just Built an AI That Does Everything

claim: Perplexity Computer supports sub-agents running in parallel and can delegate tasks within a thread, similar to Open Claw's agent orchestration
actionable: Design workflows with parallel sub-agent execution in Perplexity Computer; tasks run in parallel without blocking the main agent.
source_title: Perplexity Just Built an AI That Does Everything

claim: You can create reusable skills in Perplexity Computer via natural language; describe what you want and it generates the skill
actionable: Define workflows as skills by describing them; Perplexity will generate the implementation, making them reusable across threads.
source_title: Perplexity Just Built an AI That Does Everything

claim: Perplexity Computer can schedule proactive tasks to run at specific times and send results to mobile app, email, or Telegram
actionable: Set up scheduled agent tasks that run autonomously (e.g., Sunday earnings previews) and notify you at specific times via your preferred channel.
source_title: Perplexity Just Built an AI That Does Everything

claim: You can select orchestrator models (Opus 4.6, GPT-5.4, Sonnet 4.6) per task in Perplexity Computer; Sonnet offers cost-efficiency for many workloads
actionable: Use Sonnet as default orchestrator in Perplexity; switch to Opus or GPT-5.4 only for complex reasoning tasks to balance cost and quality.
source_title: Perplexity Just Built an AI That Does Everything

claim: Perplexity Computer can build full-stack web apps with persistent databases and embedding search layers from natural language descriptions
actionable: Use Perplexity Computer to rapidly scaffold knowledge bases and persistent agents with natural language prompts; deploy directly without manual coding.
source_title: Perplexity Just Built an AI That Does Everything
